text: Hi. My name is Claire, and I'm with AutoCare. Based on what we're seeing in your area, you may be overpaying for your auto insurance, and we want to help you find a better weight. Just to make sure we're finding you the right quote, may I ask, are you under the age of 80? Where's Werner? I only deal with him. I don't deal with a proper female. Sorry, I didn't catch that. Just to confirm really quick, are you under the age of 80? I don't deal with no females. I don't crush them.
